question: What main title text is displayed above the subtitle during the segment featuring a bright glowing nebula at the bottom center between 2 and 4 seconds? A. Learning with Doris B. An Altered Deal Production C. Learning with Darth D. How to Snap Your Fingers

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a glossy black Darth Vader helmet and a blue plaid button-down shirt sits on a dark leather couch. A beige wall with a white light switch plate stands behind them to the right. The individual raises their right hand to shoulder level before holding both hands up at shoulder height. A white undershirt is visible beneath the open collar.

question: How many lines of text are visible against the cosmic background?

Only the gesture of pointing index fingers up was shown C. Both the text 'How to Keep Your Pages' and the pointing gesture occurred D. Neither the text nor the gesture occurred
What action is the person wearing a Darth Vader helmet performing? A. turning pages B. waving hand C. making rock sign D. writing notes
Describe the sequence of hand gestures performed by the person wearing the Darth Vader helmet after the title card disappears.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a person wearing a Darth Vader helmet appears on a couch; at 6s, they raise their right hand to shoulder level; at 10s, both hands are held up with fingers curled; at 12s, index fingers point upward; at 16s, the right hand extends an index finger while the left lowers.

question: Has the person wearing the Darth Vader helmet raised both hands to shoulder height yet?

How has the person's right hand gesture changed from the 24-second mark to the 30-second mark? A. From index fingers pointing up to fingers curled B. From an OK sign to a rock-on sign C. From raising hand to index fingers pointing up D. From fingers curled to an OK sign
What hand gesture does the person wearing the Darth Vader helmet make after holding their right hand with fingers curled?
canonical_answer: They form a circle with thumb and index finger touching while extending the other three fingers.

question: What step comes immediately after the person wearing the helmet holds both hands up at shoulder height? A. The person wearing the helmet raises only the right hand to shoulder level B.
